title: Leptogastrodia longitubularis
intro: Leptogastrodia longitubularis, also known as Leptogastrodia, is a type of underground tuberous plant that belongs to the family Asparagaceae. Traditional medicine has used Leptogastrodia for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, inflammation, and convulsions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve nausea. The bioactive constituents of Leptogastrodia longitubularis include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Leptogastrodia is commonly prepared as a decoction or extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including epilepsy and fever.
